fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 64 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly treats an entry as valid when the current time is exactly equal to the expiration time. The comparison should be greater-than-or-equal (`>=`) to correctly expire entries on the boundary.

constraints.intent: The result of the buggy comparison should be the same as the correct comparison logic.
If the entry is considered valid (not expired), the current time must be strictly less than the adjusted expiry time.
A cached value should only be prepared for return if it has not yet expired.

spec.expr: not (key in entries and now == entries[key][1] and __cbfl_result is not None)

constraints.intent: An entry accessed exactly at its expiration time must be considered expired and not be returned.
